title: Definitely Gangster
overview: After eight-year-old Zander Rudichelli-Carbinelli III is diagnosed with cancer, his best friend Julie discovers a magical cardboard box that lets her take him on a quest to become "a little bit gangster." Along the way, the two face an ever-growing cast of pirates, convicts, and coppers, as Zander's bucket-list adventure spirals into an unstoppable loving comedy.

trailers.title: Trailer
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
